case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. SELENE VAZQUEZ ABELDANO

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ABELDANO, SELENE VAZQUEZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABELDANO, SELENE VAZQUEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
